title: Alive
why_this_song: Alive by Pearl Jam (1991) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "Oh I, oh, I'm still alive"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "What you thought was your daddy"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "While you were sittin'"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I can't remember anything to this very day"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Who answers?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Yeah, yeah I, oh, I'm still alive
Yeah, yeah I, oh, I'm still alive
Yeah, yeah I, oh, I'm still alive, yeah
Have I got a little story for you
What you thought was your daddy

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "alive" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "alive" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "yeah" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "yeah" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Hey I, oh, I'm still alive, yeah oh
Yeah, yeah I, oh, I'm still alive, yeah

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Have I got a little story for you

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Pearl Jam one question about "Alive", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Pearl Jam sobre "Alive", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Alive" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Alive" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Alive" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Alive" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
